stem.zh: 作为用于业务流程建模的 DFD 的记述示例，恰当的是哪一个？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate example of a DFD used for modeling business processes?

stem.en: Who is the appropriate person responsible for approving the optimization plan for an enterprise's entire information system?

イ.en: The head of the department that creates the RFP

ウ.zh: 核心系统所面向的业务部门负责人
ウ.en: The head of the business department targeted by the core system

stem.zh: A 商业街决定在互联网上建立一个网站，对商铺等进行促销宣传。通过将哪一项嵌入到网站中，可以期待提升与顾客之间的沟通交流？
stem.en: Shopping district A decided to create a website on the Internet to promote its shops and other businesses. Which of the following, when incorporated into the website, can be expected to improve communication with customers?

2012h24a-q005.stem_jp_clean: 経営判断や業務遂行などに活用するために, データベースに蓄積された顧客の購買履歴などのデータを分析して, 有用な情報を抽出する手法はどれか。

stem.zh: 为了应用于经营决策和业务执行等场景，对数据库中积累的顾客购买历史等数据进行分析，从中抽取有用信息的方法是哪一个？
stem.en: Which method analyzes data such as customers' purchase histories accumulated in a database, in order to extract useful information for use in management decisions, business operations, and so on?

2012h24a-q006.stem_jp_clean: 社員育成方法のうち, Off-JT に分類されるものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在员工培养方法中，属于 Off-JT（脱产培训）的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following employee development methods is classified as Off-JT (Off-the-Job Training)?

ア.zh: 通过向现场授予权限来激发自主性。
ア.en: Foster autonomy by delegating authority to the front line.

イ.zh: 通过脱离工作岗位实施的教育培训，让员工掌握知识和技能。
イ.en: Have employees acquire knowledge and skills through education and training conducted away from the workplace.

ウ.zh: 通过实际工作进行有计划的指导和培养，让员工掌握所需的知识和技能。
ウ.en: Provide planned guidance and development through actual work so employees acquire the necessary knowledge and skills.

エ.zh: 通过提出问题或给予简单建议，促使员工自发地朝着目标采取行动。
エ.en: Pose questions and offer simple advice to prompt employees to take action toward goals on their own.

2012h24a-q007.stem_jp_clean: 取引先に対する売掛金の貸し倒れに備えて, 他者よりも優先的に, 取引先の財産の一部を売掛金に充当できるようにする行為はどれか。

stem.zh: 为防范应收账款发生坏账，能够优先于其他人将交易对方的部分财产用于抵偿应收账款的行为是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an act that, in preparation for a bad debt on accounts receivable owed by a business partner, allows part of the partner's assets to be applied to the accounts receivable in priority over others?

stem.en: Which one is used for the purpose of showing the relationship between two kinds of data?

stem.zh: 构思出一种关于利用互联网进行企业广告的全新商业模式，并将其作为计算机系统实现了出来。能够将这个所构思的商业模式作为知识产权进行法律保护的是哪一个？
stem.en: A new business model for internet-based corporate advertising was devised and implemented as a computer system. Which of the following legally protects this devised business model as intellectual property?

stem.zh: 下列关于公司治理的说明中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of corporate governance?

ア.zh: 企业在开展企业活动时应当遵守的道德和价值规范。
ア.en: The morals and value norms that a company should observe in conducting its business activities.

イ.zh: 企业成员共同拥有的价值观念、思维与行为方式、信念等。
イ.en: The values, ways of thinking and acting, beliefs, and so on shared by the members of a company.

ウ.zh: 为使经营符合企业活动而对经营进行统治（监督）的机制。
ウ.en: A mechanism for governing management so that management appropriate to the company's business activities is carried out.

エ.zh: 认为企业作为构成社会的一员市民，也应当承担其义务的理念。
エ.en: The idea that a company, as a citizen making up society, should also bear its obligations.

stem.zh:
关于产品相关的 PPM，下列叙述中填入 a、b 的字句的恰当组合是哪一个？

a 是指用较少的投资就能产生收益的产品群。与此相对，b 是指为了未来的成长而需要一定以上投资的产品群。
stem.en:
Regarding the PPM (Product Portfolio Management) of products, which is the appropriate combination of terms to fill in blanks a and b in the following description?

a refers to a product group that generates profit with little investment. In contrast, b refers to a product group that requires a certain level of investment for future growth.

ア.zh: a-金牛（现金牛），b-瘦狗（衰退产品）

イ.zh: a-金牛（现金牛），b-问题儿（问号产品）

ウ.zh: a-明星（明星产品），b-瘦狗（衰退产品）

エ.zh: a-明星（明星产品），b-问题儿（问号产品）

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是引入 CAM 所带来的恰当效果？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate effect of introducing CAM?

ア.zh: 利用计算机控制机床，从而提高制造作业的精度和效率。
ア.en: Using a computer to control machine tools, thereby improving the precision and efficiency of manufacturing operations.

イ.zh: 利用计算机计算生产所需零件的时间和数量，从而提高订货的效率。
イ.en: Using a computer to calculate the timing and quantity of parts needed for production, thereby improving the efficiency of ordering.

ウ.zh: 利用计算机一边改变条件一边模拟设计中产品的性能，从而提高开发的效率。
ウ.en: Using a computer to simulate the performance of a product under design while varying the conditions, thereby improving the efficiency of development.

エ.zh: 利用计算机一边查看立体形状一边进行设计，从而提高设计作业的质量和效率。
エ.en: Using a computer to design while viewing three-dimensional shapes, thereby improving the quality and efficiency of design operations.

2012h24a-q013.stem_jp_clean: 戦略目標の達成状況を評価する指標には, 目標達成のための手段を評価する先行指標と目標達成度を評価する結果指標の二つがある。戦略目標が“新規顧客の開拓”であるとき, 先行指標と考えられるものはどれか。

stem.zh: 用于评价战略目标达成状况的指标有两种：评价为达成目标所采取手段的先行指标，以及评价目标达成程度的结果指标。当战略目标为“开拓新客户”时，可视为先行指标的是哪一个？
stem.en: There are two kinds of indicators for evaluating the achievement of a strategic goal: leading indicators, which evaluate the means used to achieve the goal, and result indicators, which evaluate the degree of goal achievement. When the strategic goal is "developing new customers," which one can be regarded as a leading indicator?

2012h24a-q014.stem_jp_clean: 経営戦略上の目標として, “顧客との良好な関係の構築と長期的な利益をもたらす優良顧客の獲得” を設定した。この目標の達成を支援するために構築するシステムとして, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 作为经营战略上的目标, 设定了“构建与客户的良好关系, 以及获取能带来长期利益的优质客户”。为支持实现该目标而构建的系统, 适当的是哪一个?
stem.en: As a management strategy goal, the company set "building good relationships with customers and acquiring valued customers who bring long-term profits." Which system should be built to support achieving this goal?

stem.zh: 关于市场营销组合（marketing mix）的说明，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of the marketing mix?

ア.zh: 从机会、威胁、优势、劣势各个视角考察本公司所处环境，进而制定战略的思路
ア.en: An approach that examines the company's own environment from the perspectives of opportunities, threats, strengths, and weaknesses, and then formulates a strategy

イ.zh: 通过了解顾客、竞争对手以及本公司的实力来制定战略的思路
イ.en: An approach that formulates a strategy by understanding the customer, competitors, and the company's own capabilities

ウ.zh: 对产品、渠道、价格、销售促进各个要素加以研究，进而制定战略的思路
ウ.en: An approach that examines the elements of product, place (distribution), price, and promotion, and then formulates a strategy

エ.zh: 将产品分类为明星产品、现金牛、问题产品、瘦狗产品，进而制定战略的思路
エ.en: An approach that classifies products into stars, cash cows, problem children, and dogs, and then formulates a strategy

2012h24a-q016.stem_jp_clean: 組込みシステムに求められる特性のうち, 与えられた時間で一定の処理を完了させなければならないことを意味するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在嵌入式系统所要求的特性中, 表示必须在给定的时间内完成一定处理的是哪一项?
stem.en: Among the characteristics required of embedded systems, which one means that a certain process must be completed within a given time?

2012h24a-q017.stem_jp_clean: インターネット上で構築された個人向けのオンライン書店や電子商店街に該当する電子商取引の形態はどれか。

stem.zh: 在互联网上构建的面向个人的在线书店、电子商城所对应的电子商务形态是哪一个？
stem.en: Which form of electronic commerce corresponds to consumer-oriented online bookstores and online shopping malls built on the Internet?

stem.zh: 作为对用于业务重组等场景的 MBO 的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of MBO, which is used for business restructuring and similar purposes?

ア.zh: 通过与其他公司结盟，补足本公司所欠缺的技术能力、销售能力等经营资源。
ア.en: Supplementing management resources that the company lacks, such as technical capabilities and sales capabilities, through an alliance with another company.

イ.zh: 经营者通过买下本公司的大部分股份，取得经营权。
イ.en: Managers acquiring control of the company by buying up the majority of its shares.

ウ.zh: 将本公司的部分业务分离出来，与其他公司的类似业务合并，设立新的业务公司。
ウ.en: Separating part of the company's business and merging it with a similar business of another company to establish a new operating company.

エ.zh: 为了使本公司迅速扩大业务，通过股份收购等方法，收购其他公司。
エ.en: Acquiring another company through methods such as stock acquisition, in order to rapidly expand the company's own business.

2012h24a-q019.stem_jp_clean: 企業を, 市場における競争上の地位によって, リーダ, チャレンジャ, フォロワ, ニッチャに分類したとき, チャレンジャの戦略の特徴として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 按照企业在市场中所处的竞争地位, 将企业划分为领导者(Leader)、挑战者(Challenger)、追随者(Follower)、利基者(Nicher)。下列哪一项最适合作为挑战者战略的特征？
stem.en: Companies are classified by their competitive position in the market into Leader, Challenger, Follower, and Nicher. Which of the following is the most appropriate characteristic of the Challenger's strategy?

ア.zh: 认清自身在市场中的实力, 通过追随领导者企业, 把确保稳定的利润置于优先地位, 而非追求市场份额。
ア.en: Assessing its own strength in the market, it follows the leader company and prioritizes securing stable profit over market share.

イ.zh: 向消费者提出新的商品和使用方法, 谋求扩大市场规模, 同时丰富产品种类以维持并扩大市场份额。
イ.en: Proposing new products and ways to use them to consumers, it seeks to expand the market size while broadening its product lineup to maintain and expand market share.

ウ.zh: 攻占上位企业不会瞄准的特定市场。集中有限的经营资源, 在该市场中确保并维持优势地位。
ウ.en: It attacks a specific market that the top companies do not target. By concentrating its limited management resources, it secures and maintains an advantage in that market.

エ.zh: 采取诸如攻占领导者企业尚未强化的地区或领域之类的策略。有时会与领导者企业正面对抗, 有时也会抢夺下位企业的市场份额。
エ.en: It adopts measures such as attacking regions or fields that the leader company has not yet strengthened. While it sometimes confronts the leader company directly, it also takes share away from lower-ranking companies.

2012h24a-q020.stem_jp_clean: 個人情報を他社に渡した事例のうち, 個人情報保護法において, 本人の同意が必要なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在向其他公司提供个人信息的事例中，根据《个人信息保护法》，需要取得本人同意的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among the cases of providing personal information to another company, which one requires the consent of the individual under the Act on the Protection of Personal Information?

ア.zh: 为了介绍母公司的新产品，将顾客信息提供给了母公司。
ア.en: Provided customer information to the parent company in order to introduce the parent company's new products.

イ.zh: 因需要制作顾客名单，为了委托该项工作，将顾客信息提供给了数据录入承包商。
イ.en: Provided customer information to a data-entry contractor in order to outsource the work, as creating a customer list had become necessary.

ウ.zh: 为了回收会危及人身安全的召回对象产品，将顾客信息提供给了制造商。
ウ.en: Provided customer information to the manufacturer in order to recall products subject to a recall that pose a risk to physical safety.

エ.zh: 为了委托账单的配送业务，将顾客信息提供给了配送商。
エ.en: Provided customer information to a delivery company in order to outsource the delivery of invoices.

エ.en: Improving the yield rate of the production process

製造業 A 社では，翌月の製造量を次の計算式で算出している。

翌月の製造量 ＝ 翌月の販売見込量 − 当月末の在庫量 ＋ 20

翌月の販売見込量が当月までの 3 か月の販売実績量の移動平均法によって算出されるとき，9 月の製造量は幾らか。

| 　　　 | 5月 | 6月 | 7月 | 8月 |
| 販売実績量 | 110 | 100 | 90 | 95 |
| 月末在庫量 | 10 | 10 | 35 | 25 |

stem.zh:
制造业 A 公司按以下计算公式计算下个月的制造量。

下月制造量 ＝ 下月预计销售量 − 当月末库存量 ＋ 20

当下月预计销售量按截至当月的 3 个月销售实绩量的移动平均法计算时，9 月的制造量是多少？

| 　　　 | 5月 | 6月 | 7月 | 8月 |
| 销售实绩量 | 110 | 100 | 90 | 95 |
| 月末库存量 | 10 | 10 | 35 | 25 |
stem.en:
Manufacturing Company A calculates the next month's production quantity using the following formula.

Next month's production = next month's forecast sales − end-of-current-month inventory + 20

When the next month's forecast sales is calculated by the moving average method over the actual sales of the 3 months up to the current month, what is the production quantity for September?

| 　　　 | May | Jun | Jul | Aug |
| Actual sales | 110 | 100 | 90 | 95 |
| End-of-month inventory | 10 | 10 | 35 | 25 |

stem.zh: 在向 e-Tax 等政府机关进行电子申请时，可以使用公共个人认证服务来证明本人身份。在使用该服务时，可以使用以下哪一项？
stem.en: When making an electronic application to government agencies such as e-Tax, the Public Personal Authentication Service can be used to verify one's identity. Which of the following can be used when using this service?

stem.zh: 为确认项目交付物是否满足预期的质量而进行的工作是哪一项？
stem.en: Which task is performed to confirm that a project deliverable meets the expected quality?

ア.zh: 选定为制作项目交付物所需工具的供应商
ア.en: Selecting the supplier of the tools needed to create the project deliverable

イ.zh: 实施对项目交付物的评审
イ.en: Conducting a review of the project deliverable

ウ.zh: 制定制作项目交付物的进度计划并实施进度管理
ウ.en: Creating a schedule for producing the project deliverable and managing its progress

エ.zh: 定义为制作项目交付物的各成员的角色与职责
エ.en: Defining the role and responsibility of each member for creating the project deliverable

stem.zh:
在按照图中的流程推进系统开发时，作为应包含在系统架构设计中的工作，恰当的是哪一项？

系统需求定义 → 系统架构设计 → 软件需求定义 → 软件架构设计
stem.en:
When developing a system following the process shown in the figure, which of the following is appropriate as a task to be included in the system architectural design?

System requirements definition → System architectural design → Software requirements definition → Software architectural design

ア.zh: 确定系统的功能及处理能力
ア.en: Determining the functions and processing capacity of the system

イ.zh: 确定软件的最上层结构和软件组件
イ.en: Determining the top-level structure of the software and the software components

ウ.zh: 确定硬件和网络的配置
ウ.en: Determining the configuration of hardware and networks

2012h24a-q033.stem_jp_clean: ソフトウェア開発におけるシステムテストに関する記述のうち, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 关于软件开发中系统测试的描述，以下哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of system testing in software development?

ア.zh: 由开发方在开发的最终阶段作为测试实施，确认是否满足系统需求。
ア.en: The development side conducts it as the final-stage test of development, confirming whether the system requirements are satisfied.

イ.zh: 确认系统需求定义有无过多或不足之处。
イ.en: It confirms whether there are any excesses or deficiencies in the system requirements definition.

ウ.zh: 同时实施程序的单元测试和集成测试。
ウ.en: It carries out the unit testing and integration testing of programs at the same time.

エ.zh: 由用户独立于开发者实施，确认已完成的系统对业务的适配性。
エ.en: Users conduct it independently of the developers, confirming the completed system's suitability for the business operations.

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是对 IT 治理的说明？
stem.en: Which of the following describes IT governance?

ア.zh: 积累企业员工个人所拥有的知识，并在公司内部加以共享，以此提升员工的技能与创造力，谋求增强企业竞争力。
ア.en: Accumulate the knowledge held by individual employees of a company and share it within the organization, thereby enhancing employees' skills and creativity to strengthen the company's competitiveness.

イ.zh: 并非对各项 IT 投资的正当性逐一进行评价，而是应用一套评价框架，对经营战略与 IT 战略的一致性、投资效果、组织形态等进行评价。
イ.en: Rather than evaluating the justification of each individual IT investment, apply a framework for evaluating the alignment between business strategy and IT strategy, investment effectiveness, the form of the organization, and so on.

ウ.zh: 运用财务、客户、内部业务流程、学习这四个视角，设定符合战略的各项具体实施项目与数值目标等并加以监控，从而推动企业变革。
ウ.en: Using the four perspectives of finance, customers, internal business processes, and learning, set strategy-aligned individual action items and numerical targets and monitor them, thereby driving corporate transformation.

エ.zh: 将多个企业中共同存在的业务从各企业中剥离出来，集中、整合并使其独立，由各企业共享并接受其提供的服务，以此谋求经营的高效化。
エ.en: Separate business operations that commonly exist across multiple companies from those companies, then centralize, consolidate, and make them independent so that the companies share them and receive services from them, thereby aiming for management efficiency.

stem.zh: 关于系统审计的内容，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of the content of a systems audit?

ア.zh: 由实际使用系统的用户本人对所开发的系统进行测试，以判断其是否可以投入正式运行。
ア.en: Having the users who will actually use the system test the developed system themselves in order to decide whether it may go into production.

イ.zh: 作为使用系统的认证手段，通过指纹、眼球虹膜、声纹等身体特征进行本人确认。
イ.en: Performing identity verification using physical characteristics such as fingerprints, the iris of the eye, and voiceprints as authentication for using the system.

ウ.zh: 以独立的立场，验证组织的信息系统相关风险对策是否得到了恰当的整备与运行。
ウ.en: Verifying, from an independent standpoint, whether the risk countermeasures related to an organization's information systems are appropriately established and operated.

エ.zh: 通过网络从外部侵入系统，擅自窃看数据或程序，并进行篡改、破坏等行为。
エ.en: Intruding into a system from the outside via a network and, without permission, secretly viewing data or programs, or tampering with and destroying them.

stem.zh:
在 IT 服务管理的流程中，将过去的历史记录和配置信息等存入数据库，其目的 a～c 中，仅列出所有恰当项的是哪一个？
a 对与 IT 服务相关的配置要素的信息进行维护管理，使其始终保持正确、最新的状态，并能随时确认所需信息。
b 将过去处理过的事件记录作为知识积累起来，以提高对用户咨询的一次答复率。
c 积累过去发生的故障的原因与对策，用于防止再次发生。
stem.en:
In the processes of IT service management, among the purposes a–c of building a database of past history and configuration information, which option lists all and only the appropriate ones?
a Maintain and manage the information of configuration items related to IT services so that it is always correct and up to date, and so that necessary information can be checked at any time.
b Accumulate records of incidents handled in the past as knowledge, to raise the first-response rate to inquiries from users.
c Accumulate the causes of and countermeasures for past failures, and use them to help prevent recurrence.

2012h24a-q037.stem_jp_clean: 利用者がベンダに委託したソフトウェア開発において, 利用者側が実際の運用と同様の条件でソフトウェアを使用し, 正常に稼働することを確認するテストとして, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在用户委托供应商进行的软件开发中, 由用户方在与实际运行相同的条件下使用该软件, 以确认其能否正常运行的测试是哪一项？
stem.en: In software development that a user has outsourced to a vendor, which test is appropriate for the user side to use the software under conditions equivalent to actual operation and confirm that it runs normally?

stem.zh: 在按照需求定义、外部设计、内部设计的顺序实施系统开发流程时，作为内部设计中进行的工作，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: When carrying out the system development process in the order of requirements definition, external design, and internal design, which of the following is an appropriate task to perform during internal design?

ア.zh: 确定屏幕响应时间的目标值。
ア.en: Determine the target value for screen response time.

ウ.zh: 确定存储在数据库中的记录的长度和属性。
ウ.en: Determine the length and attributes of the records stored in the database.

エ.zh: 设计输入输出屏幕和报表的布局。
エ.en: Design the layout of input/output screens and reports.

stem.zh: 关于 SLA 和 SLM 的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of SLA and SLM?

ア.zh: SLA 是服务提供方提交的服务改善建议书，SLM 是为维持和管理服务级别而提供技术手段的活动。
ア.en: An SLA is a service improvement proposal submitted by the service provider, and SLM is an activity that provides technical means for maintaining and managing service levels.

イ.zh: SLA 是服务提供方与服务使用方之间就服务级别达成的协议书，SLM 是为维持并提升 IT 服务质量而开展的活动。
イ.en: An SLA is an agreement on service levels concluded between the service provider and the service user, and SLM is an activity to maintain and improve the quality of IT services.

ウ.zh: SLA 中规定了测量服务级别达成程度、发现问题的活动，SLM 中规定了用于解决问题的技术手段。
ウ.en: An SLA specifies activities to measure the degree of achievement of service levels and detect problems, and SLM specifies the technical means for solving problems.

エ.zh: SLA 的目的在于谋求进一步提升服务级别，SLM 的目的在于就服务内容、要求水平等取得共识。
エ.en: The aim of an SLA is to seek further improvement of service levels, and the aim of SLM is to reach a common understanding of the service content, required levels, and so on.

stem.zh: 为了降低有人闯入运行计算机系统的服务器机房的风险，决定不张贴标示计算机安装位置的标识。这一措施属于哪种管理？
stem.en: To reduce the risk of intrusion into the server room where the computer system operates, it was decided not to put up signs indicating where the computers are installed. Which type of management does this measure fall under?

stem.zh:
在开发新产品时需要考虑的风险减轻措施 a~c 中，作为减轻质量方面风险的恰当措施，将其全部列举出来的是哪一项？
a 开发使用成熟稳定技术的产品。
b 为开发延误的情况投保。
c 制作试制品（样品）。
stem.en:
Among the risk mitigation measures a to c to consider when developing a new product, which option lists all and only those that are appropriate for mitigating quality-related risks?
a Develop a product using stable, proven technology.
b Take out insurance against the case where development is delayed.
c Build a prototype.

2012h24a-q042.stem_jp_clean: プロジェクトメンバ A, B, C の3者間で直接一対一でコミュニケーションをする場合には, AB 間, BC 間, C-A 間の三つの伝達経路が存在する。7人でコミュニケーションする場合の伝達経路は最大で幾つになるか。

stem.zh: 项目成员 A、B、C 三者之间进行直接一对一沟通时，存在 AB 之间、BC 之间、C-A 之间这三条传达路径。当 7 人进行沟通时，传达路径最多有几条？
stem.en: When project members A, B, and C communicate directly one-to-one with each other, there are three communication paths: between A and B, between B and C, and between C and A. When 7 people communicate, what is the maximum number of communication paths?

stem.zh: 作为项目的例子，最恰当的是哪一个？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate example of a project?

ア.zh: 银行定期对 ATM 进行检修。
ア.en: A bank performs regular maintenance inspections of its ATMs.

イ.zh: 工厂编制有关生产实绩的月度报告。
イ.en: A factory produces a monthly report on its production results.

ウ.zh: 商店增加热销商品的进货量。
ウ.en: A store increases the purchase quantity of popular products.

エ.zh: 软件公司新开发一套大型在线系统。
エ.en: A software house newly develops a large-scale online system.

stem.zh:
关于 IT 服务管理流程的说明 a～d 中，仅列出全部恰当项的是哪一个？
a 事件管理重视缩短故障的恢复时间。
b 变更管理确认变更已被正确实施。
c 问题管理查明事件的根本原因。
d 发布管理管理软件的许可证数量。
stem.en:
Among the descriptions a–d about IT service management processes, which lists all and only the appropriate ones?
a Incident management emphasizes shortening the recovery time after a failure.
b Change management verifies that changes have been implemented correctly.
c Problem management investigates the root cause of incidents.
d Release management manages the number of software licenses.

stem.zh:
下列 a～d 中，仅将面向对象的基本概念全部列出的是哪一项？
a 类　b 继承　c 数据规范化　d 白盒测试
stem.en:
Among a to d below, which option lists all and only the items that are basic concepts of object orientation?
a Class　b Inheritance　c Data normalization　d White-box testing

stem.zh: 为了验证程序的质量，分析程序内部的程序结构并据此设计测试用例的测试方法是哪一个？
stem.en: Which testing method verifies program quality by analyzing the program's internal structure and designing test cases based on it?

2012h24a-q047.stem_jp_clean: 機能が随時追加される Web ポータルシステムのサービス提供者が, 提供中の IT サービスを一覧できる利用者向けのカタログを作成した。カタログの内容に関する記述として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 某 Web 门户系统的服务提供方会随时追加功能，该提供方制作了一份面向用户、可一览当前所提供 IT 服务的目录。关于该目录内容的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: A service provider of a Web portal system, to which functions are added from time to time, created a catalog for users that lists the IT services currently being provided. Which of the following is an appropriate statement about the content of this catalog?

ア.zh: 应做到即使不熟悉 IT 的用户也能理解服务内容。
ア.en: It should be made so that even users who are not familiar with IT can understand the service content.

イ.zh: 为了不产生维护管理成本，更新应每年集中进行一次。
イ.en: To avoid incurring maintenance costs, updates should be performed once a year all at once.

ウ.zh: 为了提高描述的严谨性，即使变得让用户难以理解，也要大量使用专业术语。
ウ.en: To increase the rigor of the descriptions, technical jargon should be used heavily even if it becomes hard for users to understand.

エ.zh: 应以服务提供方便于说明的形式来制作 IT 服务目录。
エ.en: The IT service catalog should be created in a format that is easy for the service provider to explain.

stem.zh: 项目经理在制定项目的进度、成本、质量计划时，最先应实施的作业是哪一项？
stem.en: When a project manager develops the plans for a project's schedule, cost, and quality, which task should be performed first?

ア.zh: 找出贯穿整个项目、所需工期最长的活动路径。
ア.en: Find the path of activities that requires the longest duration throughout the entire project.

イ.zh: 定义项目所要创建的交付物的规格，以及完成该交付物所需的作业。
イ.en: Define the specifications of the deliverables to be produced in the project and the work needed to complete those deliverables.

ウ.zh: 向因项目的实施与结果而受到正面或负面影响的利益相关者报告项目的实绩。
ウ.en: Report the project's performance to stakeholders who are positively or negatively affected by the project's execution and results.

エ.zh: 测定针对会对项目目标产生正面或负面影响的不确定事件所采取的应对措施的效果。
エ.en: Measure the effectiveness of countermeasures against uncertain events that have positive or negative impacts on the project's objectives.

2012h24a-q049.stem_jp_clean: プロジェクトの開始から完了まで最も所要時間が掛かるクリティカルパスを見つけるのに使う図として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 用于找出从项目开始到完成耗时最长的关键路径的图，下列哪一项是合适的？
stem.en: Which diagram is appropriate for finding the critical path that takes the longest time from the start to the completion of a project?

stem.zh: 关于软件维护的说明中，正确的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of software maintenance?

ア.zh: 因开发过程中的规格变更而对程序进行的修改，属于软件维护。
ア.en: Modifying a program due to a specification change during development is software maintenance.

イ.zh: 为应对外部环境的变化而修改程序，不属于软件维护。
イ.en: Modifying a program to respond to changes in the external environment is not software maintenance.

ウ.zh: 为配合紧急的生产故障处理中所修改程序的内容而修订设计文档，属于软件维护。
ウ.en: Revising the design documentation to match the content of a program modified during emergency production-system failure handling is software maintenance.

エ.zh: 对生产系统运行中发现的程序缺陷进行修改，不属于软件维护。
エ.en: Modifying a program defect discovered while the production system is running is not software maintenance.

2012h24a-q051.stem_jp_clean: システム監査人には独立かつ専門的な立場が求められる。自社内のシステム監査を実施するとき, システム監査人の独立性に反する事例はどれか。

stem.zh: 系统审计人员需要保持独立且专业的立场。在对本公司内部实施系统审计时，下列哪一项违反了系统审计人员的独立性？
stem.en: A systems auditor is required to maintain an independent and professional position. When conducting a systems audit within one's own company, which of the following violates the independence of the systems auditor?

ア.zh: 外部的注册会计师对财务会计系统进行系统审计。
ア.en: An external certified public accountant performs a systems audit of the financial accounting system.

イ.zh: 咨询公司的系统审计人员对信息系统部门进行审计。
イ.en: A systems auditor from a consulting firm audits the information systems department.

ウ.zh: 本公司信息系统部门的系统审计人员对信息系统部门进行审计。
ウ.en: A systems auditor belonging to the company's own information systems department audits the information systems department.

エ.zh: 内部审计部门的系统审计人员对信息系统部门进行审计。
エ.en: A systems auditor from the internal audit department audits the information systems department.

2012h24a-q052.stem_jp_clean: 新たに考案したアルゴリズムを用いた画像処理のプログラミング作業を, 外部ベンダに委託することにした。情報の取扱いについて厳格に管理することを促すために契約書に盛り込む項目として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 决定将采用新构思的算法进行图像处理的编程工作委托给外部供应商。为了促使其对信息的处理进行严格管理，作为应当写入合同的项目，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: It has been decided to outsource the image-processing programming work that uses a newly devised algorithm to an external vendor. As an item to include in the contract in order to urge strict management of how information is handled, which is appropriate?

ウ.en: Performance guarantee of the entire system

stem.zh: 在关系数据库的设计中使用的 E-R 图所表现的是什么？
stem.en: What does an E-R diagram, used in relational database design, represent?

ア.zh: 随时间或行为等变化的状态变动
ア.en: The movement of states that change according to time, behavior, and so on

イ.zh: 系统的输入数据、处理与输出数据之间的关系
イ.en: The relationship among a system's input data, processing, and output data

ウ.zh: 构成目标世界的实体（人、物、地点、事件等）以及实体之间的关联
ウ.en: The entities that make up the target world (people, things, places, events, etc.) and the relationships between those entities

エ.zh: 着眼于数据流动时的业务流程变动
エ.en: The movement of a business process when focusing on the flow of data

2012h24a-q054.stem_jp_clean:
Web サイトの更新状況の把握に関して，次の記述中の a, b に入れる字句の適切な組合せはどれか。
指定した Web サイトを巡回し，Web サイトの見出しや要約などを小さくまとめた a と呼ばれる更新情報を取得してリンク一覧を作成するソフトウェアを b リーダという。

stem.zh:
关于掌握 Web 网站的更新状况，下列描述中填入 a、b 的字句的恰当组合是哪一项？
巡回访问指定的 Web 网站，获取被称为 a 的更新信息（将 Web 网站的标题和摘要等汇总成的简短内容），并据此创建链接一览表的软件称为 b 阅读器。
stem.en:
Regarding keeping track of the update status of websites, which is the appropriate combination of words to put in blanks a and b in the following description?
Software that crawls a specified website, obtains update information called a (a compact summary of the website's headlines and abstracts), and creates a list of links is called a b reader.

stem.zh: 向多块硬盘写入相同的内容，从而提高可靠性的方式是哪一个？
stem.en: Which method writes the same content to multiple hard disks to improve reliability?

stem.zh: A 想向 B 发送一封加密的电子邮件。在使用 S/MIME（Secure/Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions）发送加密邮件的情形中，下列条件中适当的是哪一项？
stem.en: A wants to send an encrypted email to B. Among the conditions for sending an encrypted email using S/MIME (Secure/Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions), which one is appropriate?

ア.zh: A 和 B 双方都需要事先取得各自的公钥证书的颁发。
ア.en: Both A and B must have obtained their own public-key certificates in advance.

イ.zh: A 和 B 双方需要属于同一个 ISP（Internet Service Provider，互联网服务提供商）。

イ.zh: 炸猪排盖饭的销售额和毛利都最多。
イ.en: Katsudon (pork cutlet rice bowl) has both the highest sales and the highest gross profit.

ウ.zh: 咖喱的毛利率排第二高。
ウ.en: Curry has the second-highest gross profit margin.

エ.zh: 和牛盖饭的毛利最多，毛利率也最高。
エ.en: Wagyu beef rice bowl has the highest gross profit and also the highest gross profit margin.

stem.en:
To calculate the ratio of each menu item's gross profit to the total gross profit (hereinafter called the gross profit ratio), a formula is entered into cell G2 of the following worksheet and copied to cells G3 through G5. Which formula should be entered into cell G2?
Note that the display format of the cells calculating the gross profit ratio is set to percentage.

|   | A | B | C | D | E | F | G |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Menu | Unit Price | Cost | Sales Quantity | Sales Amount | Gross Profit | Gross Profit Ratio |
| 2 | Beef bowl | 400 | 200 | 4,800 | 1,920,000 | 960,000 | 30.9% |
| 3 | Chicken-and-egg bowl | 450 | 250 | 2,310 | 1,039,500 | 462,000 | 14.9% |
| 4 | Pork cutlet bowl | 500 | 350 | 5,350 | 2,675,000 | 802,500 | 25.8% |
| 5 | Curry rice | 400 | 150 | 3,520 | 1,408,000 | 880,000 | 28.3% |
| 6 | Total |   |   | 15,980 | 7,042,500 | 3,104,500 | 100.0% |

stem.zh:
A 先生考虑将牛肉盖饭的单价降价 50 日元，以增加牛肉盖饭的销售数量。
如果下个月将牛肉盖饭的单价降价 50 日元，为了赚取不低于本月毛利润的金额，下个月牛肉盖饭的销售数量至少要比本月增加多少？
stem.en:
Mr. A is considering lowering the unit price of the beef bowl by 50 yen in order to increase the sales volume of beef bowls.
If the unit price of the beef bowl is lowered by 50 yen next month, by at least how much must next month's sales volume of beef bowls increase over this month in order to earn no less than this month's gross profit?

stem.zh:
A 先生接到社长的指示，要研究停售亲子盖饭、并将沙拉和鸡蛋新加入菜单的方案。为了调查沙拉和鸡蛋的销售数量以何种组合能够超过亲子盖饭的毛利，制作了如下工作表。
沙拉的单价输入到单元格 B8、成本输入到单元格 C8。鸡蛋的单价输入到单元格 B9、成本输入到单元格 C9。沙拉的销售数量以 1,000 为间隔分别输入到单元格 C12～H12，鸡蛋的销售数量以 1,000 为间隔分别输入到单元格 B13～B18。当沙拉与鸡蛋的毛利之和大于等于亲子盖饭的毛利时，在单元格 C13～H18 中显示 "○"；小于亲子盖饭的毛利时显示 "×"。要输入到单元格 C13 的计算式是哪一个？此处，单元格 C13 的计算式将被复制到单元格 C13～H18。
另外，求毛利率的单元格其显示格式为百分比显示。
stem.en:
Mr. A received instructions from the company president to consider discontinuing the oyakodon (chicken-and-egg rice bowl) and newly adding a salad and an egg to the menu. To investigate which combinations of sales quantities of the salad and the egg can exceed the gross profit of the oyakodon, he created the following worksheet.
The unit price of the salad is entered in cell B8 and its cost in cell C8. The unit price of the egg is entered in cell B9 and its cost in cell C9. The sales quantities of the salad are entered in cells C12 to H12, and the sales quantities of the egg are entered in cells B13 to B18, each in increments of 1,000. When the sum of the gross profits of the salad and the egg is greater than or equal to the gross profit of the oyakodon, display "○" in cells C13 to H18; when it is less than the gross profit of the oyakodon, display "×". Which is the formula to enter in cell C13? Here, the formula in cell C13 is copied to cells C13 to H18.
Note that the display format of the cell that calculates the gross profit ratio is percentage display.

2012h24a-q089.stem_jp_clean: 〔システム導入検討会のメモ〕の中で, 交通費申請に関して現時点で発生している問題点を記述しているものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在〔系统引入研讨会备忘录〕中，描述了与交通费申请相关、当前正在发生的问题点的是哪一项？
stem.en: Within the [System Introduction Review Meeting Memo], which items describe the problems currently occurring with respect to travel expense claims?

2012h24a-q090.stem_jp_clean: [システム導入検討会のメモ] の中で, 現時点で発生している問題点ではないが, 交通費申請でこれができると便利であるというような, システムへの要望を記述しているものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在 [系统导入研讨会备忘录] 中, 哪些项不是当前已经发生的问题, 而是描述了"如果在交通费申请中能做到这一点会很方便"这类对系统的需求?
stem.en: In the [System Introduction Review Meeting Memo], which items are not problems currently occurring, but instead describe requests for the system such as "it would be convenient if this could be done when applying for travel expenses"?

stem.zh: 〔系统引入研讨会备忘录〕(5) 中提到的“申请文件的计算错误很多，导致审批耗费时间”，对其原因进行调查后发现：错误是合计计算的简单失误，被退回的申请文件由申请者修改后再次提交，因此审批耗费了时间。为改善这一情况，系统应具备的功能中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: In the 〔Memo from the System Introduction Study Meeting〕, item (5) states "There are many calculation errors in application documents, so approval takes a long time." Investigating the cause revealed that the errors are simple mistakes in totaling, and because returned application documents are corrected by the applicant and resubmitted, approval takes a long time. To improve this, which function should the system have as an appropriate one?

ア.zh: 在申请之后，能够检索出存在计算错误的申请的功能
ア.en: A function that, after application, can search for applications containing calculation errors

イ.zh: 在申请时，自动进行必要计算的功能
イ.en: A function that, at the time of application, automatically performs the necessary calculations

ウ.zh: 让申请者能够使用带有计算器功能的软件的功能
ウ.en: A function that lets the applicant use software with a calculator function

エ.zh: 让审批申请的上司能够修正计算错误的功能
エ.en: A function that lets the supervisor who approves the application correct calculation errors

2012h24a-q092.stem_jp_clean: A さんは, システム導入の目的を “申請手続の効率化” にしたいと考えた。この目的に基づいてシステム導入を進めるに当たり, 優先して取り組むべきこととして, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: A 先生希望将系统引入的目的定为“申请手续的高效化”。基于该目的推进系统引入时，作为应优先着手处理的事项，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Mr. A wants the purpose of introducing the system to be "improving the efficiency of application procedures." When proceeding with the system introduction based on this purpose, which of the following is the appropriate matter to address with priority?

ア.zh: 多次召开系统说明会，让全体员工都能使用该系统。
ア.en: Hold many system briefing sessions so that all employees can use the system.

イ.zh: 利用市售软件，尽可能以低成本引入系统。
イ.en: Use commercially available software to introduce the system as cheaply as possible.

ウ.zh: 利用电子邮件，通知支付交通费的日期。
ウ.en: Use email to notify the date on which transportation expenses will be paid.

エ.zh: 引入根据使用区间设定入金金额的功能，并推进其自动化。
エ.en: Introduce a function that sets the payment amount based on the route section used, and proceed to automate it.

stem.zh:
下面所示的图像数据表示方法，是将图像数据转换为字符数据的方法。图 2 的图像数据中第 9～12 比特（第 2 行开头的 4 比特）的比特串，会被表示为哪个字符？

〔图像数据的表示方法〕
(1) 将图像数据的比特串每 4 比特取出一组，在每组开头补上 4 比特的值 "0100"，用 8 比特来表示。
(2) 把 (1) 求得的各 8 比特的值，用对应 JIS X 0201 字符编码的字符来表示。8 比特的值 01000000、01000001、01000010、…、01001111 在 JIS X 0201 字符编码体系中，对应字符 @、A、B、…、O。
stem.en:
The image data representation method shown below converts image data into character data. In the image data of Figure 2, which character represents the bit string of bits 9 to 12 (the first 4 bits of the 2nd row)?

[Image data representation method]
(1) Take the image data's bit string 4 bits at a time, prepend the 4-bit value "0100" to each group, and represent it with 8 bits.
(2) Represent each 8-bit value obtained in (1) with the character corresponding to its JIS X 0201 character code. In the JIS X 0201 character code system, the 8-bit values 01000000, 01000001, 01000010, ..., 01001111 correspond to the characters @, A, B, ..., O.

stem.zh:
下面所示的图像数据表示方法，是一种以压缩图像数据信息量为目的的变换。图2 所示的图像数据用多少比特来表示？

〔图像数据的表示方法〕
(1) 将图像数据用游程长度（run length）来表示，并按照最大为 15 的范围对这些值进行分段。例如，当游程长度为 20 时，将其拆分为 15 和 5 这两个游程长度。
(2) 把白色和黑色的游程长度各用 4 比特的二进制数表示，并始终以 “白和黑” 的 8 比特组合来表示。例如，当白色的游程长度像 15 和 5 这样连续出现时，就在它们之间补入一个游程长度为 0（二进制为 0000）的黑色，从而构成白色游程长度 15 与黑色游程长度 0 的组合。像这样，当白色或黑色连续出现时就在其间补入黑色或白色；以黑色开头时就在开头补入白色；以白色结尾时就在末尾补入黑色，补入游程长度为 0 的部分，从而始终构成白和黑的 8 比特组合。
stem.en:
The image-data representation method shown below is a transformation intended to compress the amount of information in image data. With how many bits is the image data shown in Figure 2 represented?

[Image-data representation method]
(1) The image data is represented using run lengths, and these values are divided up within a maximum range of 15. For example, if a run length is 20, it is split into two run lengths of 15 and 5.
(2) The white and black run lengths are each represented as a 4-bit binary number, and are always expressed as an 8-bit pair of "white and black." For example, when white run lengths continue as 15 and 5, a black run length of 0 (0000 in binary) is inserted between them, forming a pair of white run length 15 and black run length 0. In this way, when white or black continues, a black or white (run length 0) is inserted between them; when it begins with black, a white is added at the front; and when it ends with white, a black is added at the end — by inserting run lengths of 0, an 8-bit pair of white and black is always formed.

stem.zh:
下面所示的图像数据表示方法，是一种以压缩图像数据信息量为目的的变换。图2所示的图像数据用多少比特来表示？

〔图像数据的表示方法〕
(1) 用游程（run length）来表示图像数据，并以最大128为范围对这些值进行切分。例如，当游程为200时，将其分为128和72这两个游程。
(2) 对(1)中表示的每个值减去1，用7位二进制数表示。对于每个7位，白色时补0、黑色时补1作为各自的颜色信息补在首位，从而用各8位表示。
stem.en:
The image-data representation method shown below is a transformation intended to compress the amount of information in image data. With how many bits is the image data shown in Figure 2 represented?

[Image-data representation method]
(1) Represent the image data as run lengths, and split those values into ranges with a maximum of 128. For example, if a run length is 200, divide it into two run lengths, 128 and 72.
(2) Subtract 1 from each value represented in (1) and express it as a 7-bit binary number. For each 7 bits, add color information to the leading bit—0 for white and 1 for black—thus representing each as 8 bits.

stem.zh:
〔技术〕
问96　下面所示的图像数据表示方法，是一种以压缩图像数据信息量为目的的方法。图2 所示的图像数据可以用多少比特来表示？

〔图像数据的表示方法〕
(1)　将图像数据用游程（run-length）表示，并将这些值用二进制表示。
(2)　设把游程的值用二进制表示时的位数为 n，并设该 n 的位数为 m，则按下面的格式表示一个游程。

| ①位数信息 | ②分隔信息 | ③游程信息 |

①位数信息：用（m－2）个连续的 1 表示。另外，当 m 为 0～2 时，表示为 "0"
②分隔信息：分隔用 1 位的 "0" 表示
③游程信息：n

例如，当游程的值为 20 时，将其用二进制表示的值 n 为 "10100"，其位数 m 为 5。因此，当 m 为 5 时，①为（5－2）个连续的 1，即 "111"，再将其与分隔的 "0" 以及 n 连接起来，结果为 "111010100"。
(3)　将 (2) 中表示出的格式值连接起来进行表示。此时，假定图像数据从黑色开始，当图像数据从黑色开始时，视为存在游程为白色的部分，故在开头补上 "000"。
stem.en:
[Technology]
Q96  The image-data representation method shown below is a method whose purpose is to compress the amount of information in image data. With how many bits can the image data shown in Figure 2 be represented?

[Image-data representation method]
(1)  Represent the image data using run-length, and represent those values in binary.
(2)  Let n be the number of digits when the run-length value is represented in binary, and let m be the number of digits of that n. Then one run-length is represented in the following format.

| (1) Digit-count information | (2) Separator information | (3) Run-length information |

(1) Digit-count information: represented by (m-2) consecutive 1s. Note that when m is 0 to 2, it is represented as "0".
(2) Separator information: the separator is represented by a single "0".
(3) Run-length information: n

For example, when the run-length value is 20, the value n represented in binary is "10100", and its digit count m is 5. Therefore, when m is 5, (1) is (5-2) consecutive 1s, i.e. "111", and connecting this with the separator "0" and n gives the result "111010100".
(3)  Connect the values represented in the format of (2) to express them in sequence. At this time, assume that the image data starts with black; when the image data starts with black, treat it as if there is a white run-length, and prepend "000" at the beginning.

2012h24a-q097.stem_jp_clean: A社のインターネット上のWebページを使った商品購入では, 会員の個人情報に関する利用目的を「注文や支払に関する連絡, 配達といった商品購入に関する利用」に限定している。このとき, 〔会員登録をするWebページの仕組み〕の②の会員登録に関して, 利用目的から考えて不適切な点があると指摘された。その指摘として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在A公司通过互联网上的网页进行商品购买时，将会员个人信息的使用目的限定为「与订单和付款相关的联络、配送等与商品购买相关的使用」。此时，针对〔进行会员注册的网页机制〕中②的会员注册，有人指出从使用目的来看存在不恰当之处。作为该指摘内容，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: When purchasing goods through A Company's website on the Internet, the purpose of using members' personal information is limited to "use related to purchasing goods, such as contact concerning orders and payments, and delivery." In this context, regarding the member registration at ② of [the mechanism of the member-registration web page], it was pointed out that there is an inappropriate point when considering the purpose of use. Which of the following is the appropriate point being raised?

ア.zh: 关于ID，应使用A公司的客户编号，而不应让用户输入。
ア.en: For the ID, A Company's customer number should be used, and the user should not be made to enter it.

イ.zh: 关于出生年月日和性别，不应设为必填输入项。
イ.en: The date of birth and gender should not be made mandatory input items.

ウ.zh: 关于电子邮件地址和密码，不应让用户输入相同信息两次。
ウ.en: For the email address and password, the user should not be made to enter the same information twice.

エ.zh: 在输入了电子邮件地址的情况下，不应将地址和电话号码设为必填输入项。
エ.en: When an email address has been entered, the address and telephone number should not be made mandatory input items.

stem.zh:
对于下面所示〔关于个人信息妥善管理的规程〕的各项内容，在〔会员注册的 Web 页面机制〕的①〜⑤中，作为各项与有助于遵守该项的机制的组合，恰当的是哪一个？

〔关于个人信息妥善管理的规程〕
第1项　在为达成利用目的所必需的范围内，必须将个人信息管理为准确且最新的内容。
第2项　必须为防止所处理的个人信息泄露、灭失或损毁，以及为其他个人数据的安全管理，采取必要且适当的措施。
第3项　让从业人员处理个人信息时，为实现该个人信息的安全管理，必须对该从业人员进行必要且适当的监督。
第4项　将个人信息处理的全部或一部分委托他人时，为实现所委托处理的个人信息的安全管理，必须对受托人进行必要且适当的监督。
stem.en:
For each clause of the following [Regulations on the Proper Management of Personal Information], which is the appropriate combination of a clause and the mechanism (among ① to ⑤ in [Mechanisms of the Web Page for Member Registration]) that helps comply with it?

[Regulations on the Proper Management of Personal Information]
Clause 1: Within the scope necessary to achieve the purpose of use, personal information must be managed so as to be kept accurate and up to date.
Clause 2: Necessary and appropriate measures must be taken to prevent leakage, loss, or damage of the personal information handled, and for other safe management of personal data.
Clause 3: When having employees handle personal information, necessary and appropriate supervision must be exercised over those employees so that the safe management of the personal information is ensured.
Clause 4: When entrusting all or part of the handling of personal information to another party, necessary and appropriate supervision must be exercised over the entrusted party so that the safe management of the entrusted personal information is ensured.

ア.zh: 关于个人信息妥善管理的规程＝第1项 / 会员注册的 Web 页面机制＝①
ア.en: Regulations on the Proper Management of Personal Information = Clause 1 / Mechanisms of the Web Page for Member Registration = ①

イ.zh: 关于个人信息妥善管理的规程＝第2项 / 会员注册的 Web 页面机制＝⑤
イ.en: Regulations on the Proper Management of Personal Information = Clause 2 / Mechanisms of the Web Page for Member Registration = ⑤

ウ.zh: 关于个人信息妥善管理的规程＝第3项 / 会员注册的 Web 页面机制＝③
ウ.en: Regulations on the Proper Management of Personal Information = Clause 3 / Mechanisms of the Web Page for Member Registration = ③

エ.zh: 关于个人信息妥善管理的规程＝第4项 / 会员注册的 Web 页面机制＝④
エ.en: Regulations on the Proper Management of Personal Information = Clause 4 / Mechanisms of the Web Page for Member Registration = ④

2012h24a-q099.stem_jp_clean: [会員登録をする Web ページの仕組み]の⑤の暗号化による通信で利用する仕組みとして, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在[会员注册的 Web 页面机制]中，⑤所示的加密通信所使用的机制，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: In [the mechanism of a Web page for member registration], which of the following is the appropriate mechanism used for the encrypted communication shown in ⑤?

stem.zh: A 公司使用某互联网服务提供商（以下称 ISP）的主机托管服务来运行 Web 服务器和数据库服务器（以下称 DB 服务器）。会员信息经由位于 ISP 的 DMZ（隔离区）内的 Web 服务器，存储到位于受外部保护的 ISP 网络内的 DB 服务器中。B 先生需要将会员信息从 ISP 的 Web 服务器或 DB 服务器传输到 A 公司内部的 PC 上，并要设计一种在传输过程中不会发生个人信息泄露的机制。作为传输机制，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Company A uses the housing service of an Internet service provider (hereafter ISP) to operate a Web server and a database server (hereafter DB server). Member information is stored, via the Web server located inside the ISP's DMZ, into the DB server located within the ISP's network that is protected from the outside. Mr. B needs to transfer member information from the ISP's Web server or DB server to a PC inside Company A, and has been tasked with devising a mechanism that prevents leakage of personal information during the transfer. Which of the following is an appropriate transfer mechanism?

ア.zh: 定期将存储在 DB 服务器中的会员信息文件以 CSV 格式的文本文件形式导出，把文本文件的内容写入邮件正文，进行病毒检查后发送给自己。
ア.en: Periodically export the member information file stored on the DB server as a CSV-format text file, write the contents of the text file into the body of an email, perform a virus check, and then send it to oneself.

イ.zh: 通过 VPN（虚拟专用网络）连接 ISP 与 A 公司，定期使用 FTP 传输存储在 DB 服务器中的会员信息文件。
イ.en: Connect the ISP and Company A via a VPN (Virtual Private Network), and periodically transfer the member information file stored on the DB server using FTP.

ウ.zh: 在会员信息登记到 Web 服务器的时刻，自动将该信息记入邮件正文发送给自己，并在收到邮件时进行病毒检查。
ウ.en: At the moment member information is registered on the Web server, automatically write that information into the body of an email and send it to oneself, and perform a virus check when the email is received.

エ.zh: 在会员信息登记到 Web 服务器的时刻，自动使用 FTP 传输该信息。此时，在接入 A 公司网络的时刻，通过 ID 和口令进行身份验证。
エ.en: At the moment member information is registered on the Web server, automatically transfer that information using FTP. At this time, perform authentication with an ID and password when connecting to Company A's network.
